input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.6.1.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.6.1.2
            TITLE: contact with any tractive system connections with a 100 mm long, 6 mm diameter insulated

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.6.1.2: Contact with any Tractive System connections with a 100 mm long, 6 mm diameter insulated
EV.6.1.2 Contact with any Tractive System connections with a 100 mm long, 6 mm diameter insulated 
test probe must not be possible when the Tractive System enclosures are in place.

final_answer: Contact with any Tractive System connections with a 100 mm long, 6 mm diameter insulated test probe must not be possible when the Tractive System enclosures are in place.
